AI Agents & Frameworks.title: NVIDIA AI Introduces TiDAR: A Hybrid Diffusion Autoregressive Architecture For High Throughput LLM Inference
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: NVIDIA AI introduces TiDAR, a new hybrid diffusion autoregressive architecture designed to enhance the throughput and efficiency of Large Language Model (LLM) inference. This technical advancement aims to improve performance for LLM applications, including those used in AI agents.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Building Effective AI Agents

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Koinify: The Future of Crypto Crowd Funding

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Nasdaq, Citi Join Novogratz in Funding Blockchain Firm Symbiont
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Nasdaq and Citi have reportedly joined Galaxy Digital's Mike Novogratz in a funding round for Symbiont, a blockchain firm. This investment underscores significant institutional interest in enterprise-grade blockchain solutions.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Homeland Security Funding Blockchain Technology via SBIRs
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: The Department of Homeland Security is actively funding blockchain technology projects through its Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program. This initiative aims to leverage blockchain for national security applications.

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Funding Blockchain Ecosystems

Blockchain VC Funding.title: Indian Banks to Start Blockchain-Based Funding for SMEs to Avoid Defaulters
Blockchain VC Funding.summary: Indian banks are planning to implement a blockchain-based funding system for Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) to mitigate loan defaults. This initiative aims to enhance transparency and efficiency in lending processes.
